summary: Iter 7 review: 92/92 backend tests pass (79 prior + 13 new) and full frontend e2e flows verified for the admin event-edit + merchants + guilds CRUD features. New endpoints PUT /api/admin/events/{id}, GET /api/merchants, GET /api/guilds, plus admin POST/PUT/DELETE for /api/admin/merchants and /api/admin/guilds all behave per spec, including 401/403 enforcement, 404 on missing IDs, null->'' normalisation on optional event fields, status preservation on PUT, and coexistence with the existing PATCH (status-only) handler. Public /shops shows 17 gear shops + 2 smiths from API; /guilds shows 6 SVTL members + 15 other guilds from API. Admin dashboard renders Merchants and Guilds panels; Edit button on event rows opens AdminEventEditDialog with all fields prefilled. Live UI flow verified end-to-end: created TEST_ merchant + guild via dialogs, saw them in panel + DB, deleted them, success toast 'Toiminto onnistui' fired. FI/EN/SV i18n keys for admin.edit/edit_event/cancel/save/merchants_title/guilds_title/field_name/confirm_delete_simple all defined; no raw keys leaked in FI render.

issues: A11y console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' from Radix Dialog. Non-blocking but should add a hidden DialogDescription or pass aria-describedby to silence the warning.

action_items: (Optional) Add <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to AdminEventEditDialog, AdminMerchantsPanel and AdminGuildsPanel Radix DialogContent to silence the a11y console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/admin/events/{id} correctly normalises null/undefined optional fields to '' before $set, so EventOut response & DB document stay schema-consistent (server.py:495-514).
PUT path leaves status untouched (no $set on status), so an approved event stays approved after edit — verified end-to-end.
MerchantOut/GuildOut response models exclude _id implicitly via _normalize_* helpers — clean handling.

Seed (seed_taxonomy.py) is idempotent: matches by unique 'name' index and updates existing rows, inserts only new — safe to re-run; correct counts (17 gear + 2 smith + 6 svtl + 15 other = 19 merchants, 21 guilds).
GET /api/merchants & /api/guilds are public (no auth dep) per spec — verified by anonymous request.
All 5 new admin write endpoints depend on get_admin_user, which 401s on no token and 403s on non-admin — verified.
Frontend Shops.jsx & Guilds.jsx now fetch from /api/merchants & /api/guilds and group by category — confirmed live rendering 17+2 and 6+15.
AdminDashboard.jsx adds [data-testid="edit-{eventId}"] (line 372), AdminEventEditDialog opens with all event fields prefilled — verified at runtime.
AdminMerchantsPanel + AdminGuildsPanel: add/edit/delete dialogs all wired with proper data-testids; create→list reload→delete cycle works end-to-end via UI.
i18n keys admin.edit/edit_event/cancel/save/merchants_title/guilds_title/field_name/confirm_delete_simple resolved in FI/EN/SV (i18n.js lines 126-143 FI, 350-367 EN, 570-587 SV).
Existing PATCH /api/admin/events/{id} (status-only) regression test added — still works alongside new PUT.
Pre-login 401s on /api/auth/me are expected AuthProvider cold-load noise (carried over from iter 6/7 reports).
Minor: a11y warning 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' fires on every dialog open — purely a console warning, no functional impact.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (shops/guilds public read, admin merchants & guilds CRUD via dialogs, event edit dialog prefill+save, no i18n leaks)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed merchants/guilds/events and self-clean via DELETE within the same test. No residual TEST_ data left in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://events-refresh-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin login: /admin/login → email + password → Enter. Admin dashboard at /admin shows: status tabs, event rows (each with [data-testid='edit-{id}'], approve, reject, delete), Newsletter panel, Weekly report panel, AdminMerchantsPanel ([data-testid='admin-merchants-panel'] + 'merchant-add-btn'), AdminGuildsPanel ([data-testid='admin-guilds-panel'] + 'guild-add-btn'). Dialogs: 'event-edit-dialog' / 'merchant-dialog' / 'guild-dialog' with field testids prefixed edit-* / merchant-field-* / guild-field-*, save buttons 'edit-save-btn' / 'merchant-save-btn' / 'guild-save-btn'. Public /shops and /guilds are SSR-empty until JS fetches /api/merchants & /api/guilds — wait for networkidle before asserting content. The seeded merchant 'Rautaportti' and guild 'Birckalan Soturit' are good canary names.
rca of the issue: No issues. All iter 7 features (admin event full edit + merchants/guilds CRUD with idempotent seed and public-read split from admin-write) work end-to-end.
